Built build-fixtures.mjs script that anonymizes 1771-person real GEDCOM into test/fixtures/sample-anon.ged + sample-anon.gdz. Also created synthetic test/fixtures/small.ged (12 people, multi-spouse, non-ASCII, custom tags). All 56 unit tests pass. Privacy verified: no real names/URLs in committed fixtures.

GEDZIP import/export fully implemented: gedzip.ts (import, export, thumbnail), media.service.ts (Object URL lifecycle), import.service.ts updated, Dexie schema extended. 7 gedzip tests pass. Blocked dependency 433.13 now closed.

e2e/sample-parse.spec.ts: 4 tests — full 1771-count in IndexedDB, non-ASCII renders without mojibake, custom tags in raw AST, virtual scroll scroll-to-bottom. All pass (13 total e2e green, 56 unit green).

GEDCOM 7.0 support added: @VOID@ pointer (no orphan warning), DATE PHRASE fallback, CONT/CONC concatenation in fallback parser, SNOTE shared notes resolved. 8 v7 tests + all 64 unit tests green. No regression to 5.5.1 round-trip.

Spike: d3-dag rejected (bundle weight, doesn't model union-between-spouses naturally). Hand-rolled row layout in dag-layout.ts: parents row (–1), focus+spouses+union nodes row (0), per-union children row (+1). Family mode button added to tree view. 6 dag.spec tests + 70 total unit tests green. Build passes.
e2e/sample-tree-ui.spec.ts: 5 tests — pedigree renders focus highlight, pan/zoom+recenter, family mode no crash+union nodes, click-to-focus, zero network egress. All 18 e2e + 70 unit tests green.

EditService (create/update/addParentChild/linkSpouses) + cycle detection. start-with-yourself onboarding + edit panel in list view. APP_INITIALIZER restores tree from Dexie on reload. Fixed list-shell height for CDK virtual scroll hit-testing. 80 unit + 23 e2e green.
All 7 sub-tasks complete: GEDCOM serializer, v7 read, photos/GEDZIP, pedigree/descendants views, family DAG, editing+onboarding, and e2e tree UI tests.

Pure relationship() function with ancestor-only BFS for LCA + bidirectional BFS for in-law detection. Correct terms for parent/child/grandparent/sibling/half-sibling/aunt-uncle/niece-nephew/1st-2nd cousin/cousin-removed/in-law/not-connected. 22 unit tests green.
findDuplicates() with name (exact/initial/partial) + birth/death year + shared kin scoring. Ranked pairs above 0.4 threshold with evidence. 9 unit tests green.

buildTimeline() pure function with parseSortKey (ABT/BEF/AFT/partial/missing safe), direct events + marriage + child-birth derived events, sorted chronological. TimelineComponent uses signals. 14 unit tests green.
Pure birthdaysInWindow(today passed in) with Feb29 fallback, partial date skip, ABT prefix strip, wouldBe age, dismissible-ready. 10 tests green.
All 4 delight sub-tasks complete: relationship calculator, duplicate detector, life timeline, birthday window matcher.
FAIL-CLOSED redaction: applyRedaction() + scrubNotes(). No dates/death → living. 110-yr configurable threshold. Redacted nodes have zero PII. omitLiving option. 16 adversarial tests green.

AES-GCM+PBKDF2≥600k encrypted export. Versioned binary header (magic+version+KDF+iterations+salt+IV). 4MB chunked encryption. Wrong-passphrase vs corrupt-file error discrimination. checkPassphraseStrength. 14 tests including 5MB large-blob chunked round-trip.

generatePublishHtml() single self-contained HTML: applies E1a redaction, inlines JSON, CSS, base64 photos (EXIF-stripped via canvas), no external requests, size-guarded with warnings. 9 unit tests covering living-person redaction, no-external-URLs, one-way notice, size warning.

generateSvg() + generatePdf() via jsPDF+svg2pdf.js. Multi-column SVG with card-based layout, page tiling (pageBreakThreshold), C1 redaction applied. SVG has no external asset refs. 9 tests covering deceased names, living exclusion, multi-page count, one-way notice.
All 4 expansion sub-tasks complete: E1a redaction model, E1b publish HTML emitter, E3 PDF/SVG print, E4 AES-GCM encrypted export.
